title: アツい夢をライバルと！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Bamboo Memory and I are about to
start our usual training, when...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! Make it extra intense for me today, will
you?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wait. What are all those people doing at the
track?

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
What a great run! I got some great shots of your
face!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Actually, there are a few things I'm not quite
satisfied with. If possible, I'd like to run one more
lap!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that should be fine. Let's touch up your
makeup first.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's an interview! Yaeno has been getting so
much attention lately.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I run with her all the time, and it always gets me
so pumped! She's the best!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It's no wonder people want to interview her!
choice_data_list: We've got to step up our game!
We've got to step up our game!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You said it! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Although... Yaeno doesn't seem as sharp or fired
up as usual...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It's like she isn't herself.
choice_data_list:
Maybe it feels weird running while getting
photographed?

Maybe it feels weird running while getting
photographed?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Maybe...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: If so, I've got a good idea! I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: I think this shot came out pretty well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No, it's still a touch off. I'm sorry, can we try it
one more time?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Where's your passion, Yaeno?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Bamboo?! Wh-why are you dressed like that?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, because my signature racewear is packed
with dreams! I figured it would get you fired up!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
My dream is to clash with my rivals in fiery
competition. My trainer and I designed my
signature racewear with that vision in mind.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Take a look! The character for "dream" is literally
sewn into it!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Dreams, huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's right! My signature racewear is my ticket to
my dreams!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Now, I want you to take the stage with me! I'll get
you fired up!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oh! ...You're right. Bamboo, please run with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two of them take off into a
passionate run...

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
That was incredible! I could see fire in both of
your eyes as you strove for victory! The photos
are remarkable!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see the prints! Now, if you'll excuse
me...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Of course! Thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Um... You really helped me out today, Bamboo.
Please accept this token of my th—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I don't need anything right now!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But... why?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Because I want you to thank me on the track
someday!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Right!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe! It sure is great having a rival!
choice_data_list:
Looks like your next race together will be a
fiery one.

Looks like your next race together will be a
fiery one.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe! It sure is great having a rival!
choice_data_list:
Looks like your next race together will be a
fiery one.

Looks like your next race together will be a
fiery one.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Of course! If the two of us are running, the race is
bound to be red-hot!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: All right! I've gotta train hard if I want to win!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ah! I'm so excited!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following this, Bamboo Memory throws herself
into her training with more vigor than ever
before.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Are you saying you think I can't win?!
choice_data_list: I just want to hear you say it.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see! Putting it into words definitely helps
get you motivated!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm definitely gonna win this showdown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory looks incredibly serious as she
makes this declaration.
